name: Evidence and Assumption Register
boundary: This register is static advisory prototype data. It does not retrieve live evidence, validate compliance, verify bank information, certify CMMC status, validate healthcare compliance, or perform live integrations.

evidence_states.label: Provided
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence is represented as available in the prototype context.

evidence_states.label: Missing
evidence_states.meaning: Required evidence is not represented and should be gathered before relying on the claim or action.

evidence_states.label: Stale
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence exists but may be too old for the decision purpose.

evidence_states.label: Assumed
evidence_states.meaning: The prototype assumes this item for demonstration and it must be verified in a real assessment.

evidence_states.label: Conflicting
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence points in different directions and needs review.

evidence_states.label: Needs Verification
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence may exist, but a credible verification path is required before action.

register_items.title: Current cloud logging configuration
register_items.verification_path: Review current cloud logging settings and retention policy
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Leadership may assume events are reviewable when logs are incomplete or missing.

register_items.title: MFA coverage for privileged and remote users
register_items.verification_path: Review identity provider MFA enforcement and exception list
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Privilege and access trust may be overstated if MFA gaps exist.

register_items.title: Privileged account inventory and approval authority
register_items.verification_path: Confirm privileged account list, business owner, and approval workflow
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Excessive admin privileges may persist without visible ownership.

register_items.title: CUI boundary definition
register_items.verification_path: Confirm systems, data flows, users, and vendors that handle CUI or FCI
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: CMMC applicability and readiness may be materially wrong if the boundary is wrong.

register_items.title: Vendor data sharing and permitted use terms
register_items.verification_path: Review contract, DPA, security addendum, and permitted use language
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Sensitive data may be shared or reused outside leadership intent.

register_items.title: Approved AI tool inventory and access list
register_items.verification_path: Confirm approved AI tools, users, data classes, and usage boundaries
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Shadow AI usage may expose customer, regulated, or proprietary data.

register_items.title: Vendor banking change verification
register_items.verification_path: Confirm banking change through approved out-of-band verification and controller approval
register_items.decision_risk_if_wrong: Payment may be sent to fraudulent or unauthorized destination.
